TaskDescription: Sets of 7 digits presented visually in four blocks: 1) Simultaneously for 2800 ms; and Sequentially for 2) 400 ms, 3) 1000 ms, 4) 600 ms with 400 ms ISI. Participants were asked to retain a set for 6 s and then recall it in correct serial order.
MiscChannelDescription: Includes PPG channel recorded simultaneously with EEG
